description: Golden-file-backed integration tests for the four simplest CLI commands (version, init, networks, config) using the IntegrationTest + TestContext framework, plus PathNormalizer and ShortHexNormalizer additions to the normalizer framework.

userStories.title: PathNormalizer and ShortHexNormalizer for Golden Files
userStories.description: As a developer, I want PathNormalizer and ShortHexNormalizer in the test framework so that golden files are stable across machines and short hex strings are consistently normalized.
acceptanceCriteria: PathNormalizer::new(vec!["/tmp/abc123".into()]).normalize("path /tmp/abc123/foo") returns "path <PROJECT_ROOT>/foo"
ShortHexNormalizer is defined in normalizer.rs and exported from the framework module
smoke_phase3.rs imports ShortHexNormalizer from the framework instead of defining it locally
Existing tests in smoke_phase3.rs still pass
cargo test --workspace passes

userStories.title: Version Command Golden File Tests
userStories.description: As a developer, I want golden-file integration tests for treb version (human and JSON output) so that version output format is locked down by regression tests.
acceptanceCriteria: integration_version.rs contains two #[test] functions
Both tests use IntegrationTest + run_integration_test + TestContext::new("project")
ShortHexNormalizer is applied as an extra normalizer for version-specific short hex strings
Golden files exist at tests/golden/version_human/output.golden and tests/golden/version_json/output.golden
Both tests pass with cargo test --workspace

userStories.title: Init Command Golden File Tests
userStories.description: As a developer, I want golden-file integration tests for treb init covering fresh init, idempotent re-init, --force reset, and missing foundry.toml error so that init behavior is locked down by regression tests.
acceptanceCriteria: integration_init.rs contains four #[test] functions
init_fresh golden output includes .treb/config.local.json and .treb/registry.json artifact contents
init_idempotent golden output contains "already initialized"
init_force golden output contains reset message and shows default config values in artifact
init_no_foundry_toml uses expect_err(true) and golden output contains error text mentioning foundry.toml
PathNormalizer is used to replace workdir absolute paths with <PROJECT_ROOT>
All four tests pass with cargo test --workspace

userStories.title: Networks Command Golden File Tests
userStories.description: As a developer, I want golden-file integration tests for treb networks covering unresolved env vars, JSON output, missing foundry.toml error, and no endpoints so that networks output is locked down by regression tests.
acceptanceCriteria: integration_networks.rs contains four #[test] functions
networks_unresolved_env_vars golden output shows a table with "unresolved env var" in the Status column
networks_unresolved_json golden output is valid JSON with chain_id as null
networks_no_foundry_toml uses expect_err(true) and error mentions foundry.toml
networks_no_endpoints golden output contains "No RPC endpoints configured"
No test requires a live RPC or Anvil node
All four tests pass with cargo test --workspace

userStories.title: Config Command Golden File Tests
userStories.description: As a developer, I want golden-file integration tests for treb config show/set/remove covering default display, set/show round-trip, remove/show round-trip, uninitialized error, and invalid key error so that config command behavior is locked down by regression tests.
acceptanceCriteria: integration_config.rs contains six #[test] functions
config_show_default golden output includes Namespace, default, Network, not set, and a senders table
config_show_json golden output is valid JSON with namespace, network, profile, config_source, project_root, senders fields
config_set_show_round_trip golden output shows set messages and updated config show reflecting changes, plus config.local.json artifact
config_remove_show_round_trip golden output shows remove message and config show reflecting reset to default
config_show_uninitialized uses expect_err(true) and error mentions treb init
config_set_invalid_key uses expect_err(true) and error lists valid keys (namespace, network)
PathNormalizer replaces workdir paths with <PROJECT_ROOT> in all tests that show paths
All six tests pass with cargo test --workspace
